card.text_raw_chs:
[gold]消耗[/gold]所有[gold]手牌[/gold]。
如果有至少9张牌通过这个方法被[gold]消耗[/gold]了，则获得1层[gold]无实体[/gold]。

card.text_raw_eng:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If 9 cards were [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
